/usr/bin/c++  -march=native -Werror -Wfatal-errors -Wpedantic -pedantic-errors      -Wall -Wextra -ftemplate-backtrace-limit=1 -Wno-unknown-pragmas -Wno-sign-compare -O3 CMakeFiles/GenerateODPairs.dir/GenerateODPairs.cc.o -o GenerateODPairs  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12 /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
